properties.name: adapter.ecs.logs.print-on-error.print-req-resp-level
properties.description: Controls which error type triggers request and response logging when adapter.ecs.logs.print-on-error.print-req-resp is enabled.

values.description: Logs request and response payloads only when the error is a BusinessExceptionECS.
Logs request and response payloads for any Exception, including BusinessExceptionECS.
Logs request and response payloads for any Throwable.
